name: ui-backlot
description: Editable, high-fidelity recreations of real app UIs (Claude, Codex, macOS, Office, Figma, Premiere, browsers) for HyperFrames demo videos. Install blocks with `npx hyperframes add <name>` after pointing hyperframes.json at this registry; install examples with degit.

items.name: browser-app
items.title: Editable Browser App
items.description: Actual-reference-informed browser chrome plus Airtable-like editable app surface. Browser-backed demos such as SaaS tools, internal dashboards, Airtable-like scenes, or web research workflows. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.

items.name: calendar-app
items.title: macOS Calendar App
items.description: Actual Apple Calendar screenshot-informed Week scheduling shell. Scheduling, coordination, and calendar-driven workflow scenes. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.

items.name: claude-agent-rail
items.title: Claude Agent Context Rail
items.description: High — poured verbatim from the pass-100 claude-desktop cowork rail (itself built from public layout description; no live cowork-rail capture exists yet), light + .theme-dark via canonical --claude-* tokens. Reusable Claude task/status sidecar for demos that need progress, context, artifacts, connectors, or working-file state without the full Claude app shell.

items.name: claude-attachment-draft
items.title: Claude Attached Folder Draft
items.description: High against public Claude Cowork layout evidence, pending sanitized live Claude attachment capture. Pre-submit scenes where a user has attached a local folder or files before Claude starts working.

items.name: claude-chat-pane
items.title: Claude Chat Pane
items.description: No-sidebar chat pane composed from the shared claude-thread-core (cinematic scale) and claude-composer atoms via runtime/backlot-component-loader.js, poured into the Sonnet 4.6 launch-frame rhythm; the pane owns only its topbar chrome. Claude chat scenes that need just the active topbar, message field, and composer without sidebar, task rail, browser, Finder, Office, Codex, or desktop chrome.

items.name: claude-cinematic
items.title: Claude Cinematic Conversation
items.description: Consolidated from the six launch/cinematic prototypes (pass 115); canonical tokens + shared response-mark atom, pending official product capture. The one zoomed cinematic Claude conversation for close-up video beats: ?beat=prompt (user asks + thinking loader), ?beat=reply (large serif answer + composer), ?beat=complete (done copy). Copy overridable via data-copy slots; add class theme-dark for dark. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.

items.name: claude-code-terminal-session
items.title: Claude Code Terminal Session
items.description: Reference-matched light terminal panel informed by the 2026-02-18 Claude Code-to-Figma video frames. Small Claude Code terminal-session clips that need the light reference-style panel without importing the dark Claude Code desktop shell or the warm Claude chat shell.

items.name: claude-composed-app
items.title: Claude Canonical Desktop Shell (composed)
items.description: High against pass-100 claude-desktop chat/cowork/code pages (element rects and sampled surfaces pixel-match the claude-desktop captures per page and theme), pending sanitized live Claude full-shell capture. Canonical parameterized Claude desktop shell: data-page="chat|cowork|code" (default cowork), data-sidebar/data-rail on|off toggles, .theme-dark for dark; one file replaces the stacked claude-desktop pages while keeping sidebar, thread, composer, and rail independently editable atoms. Capture variants: capture:claude-composed-app{,-chat,-code,-dark,-chat-dark}. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.

items.name: claude-composer
items.title: Claude Working Composer
items.description: High — poured from the pass-100 live-app-verified claude-desktop shell; data-page="chat|cowork" mirrors the two desktop composer variants, light + .theme-dark via canonical --claude-* tokens. Reusable floating Claude composer beats, especially clips that need attachment chips and running controls without the full Claude app shell.

items.name: claude-home
items.title: Claude New Chat Home
items.description: High, pending sanitized live Claude capture. Opening prompt scenes before a working Claude thread exists.

items.name: claude-response-mark
items.title: Claude Response Mark
items.description: High against Sonnet 4.6 launch-frame response mark proportions, hand-authored and pending official product capture. Reusable editable Claude response mark for sparse launch replies, completion states, and Claude thread surfaces that need consistent mark geometry.

items.name: claude-sidebar
items.title: Claude Sidebar
items.description: High — poured from the pass-100 live-app-verified claude-desktop shell; data-page="chat|cowork|code" mirrors the three desktop sidebar pages, light + .theme-dark via canonical --claude-* tokens. Reusable Claude left navigation for videos that need workspace/task context without importing the full Claude shell.

items.name: claude-thread-core
items.title: Claude Working Thread Core
items.description: High — poured from the pass-100 live-app-verified claude-desktop shell (cowork working thread); data-scale="working|cinematic" (cinematic ported from claude-chat-pane 48px serif treatment), light + .theme-dark via canonical --claude-* tokens. Reusable Claude transcript/tool-use pane for videos that need the active thread without sidebar, composer, task rail, or outer app window. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.

items.name: claude-tool-result
items.title: Claude Completed Tool Result
items.description: High against public Claude Cowork layout evidence, pending sanitized live Claude tool-result capture. Post-action scenes where Claude has read files, updated a deck or app, and returned a concise completion summary.

items.name: codex-app
items.title: Codex Desktop Workbench
items.description: Official screenshot-informed editable Codex desktop app reconstruction, matching the light-mode project sidebar, active thread, composer, toolbar, review pane structure, and thin rounded icon language; pending sanitized live account capture. Desktop Codex demos that need a light-mode current app shell with real-product-like sidebar navigation, active thread, model/permission composer, toolbar controls, Git diff review pane, and local-work metadata, without importing Terminal, Claude, Finder, browser, Office, Figma, or Premiere surfaces. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.

items.name: codex-terminal
items.title: Codex Terminal
items.description: Code-native Terminal/Codex CLI shell, informed by local Codex CLI help and app metadata. Command-line Codex demos, test runs, diffs, and agent execution status scenes.

items.name: codex-thread-core
items.title: Codex Conversation Core
items.description: High, pending sanitized live Codex capture. Zoomed-in cuts on the Codex working-thread body (user turn, assistant reply, command-output card, composer) without surrounding app chrome. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.

items.name: excel-workbook
items.title: Excel-style Workbook
items.description: Code-native Office-style spreadsheet shell. Spreadsheet analysis, formula editing, chart updates, and workbook automation scenes.

items.name: figma-editor
items.title: Figma-style Design Editor
items.description: Code-native design editor shell. Design handoff, frame editing, selection-handle, and Claude-to-design workflow scenes. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.

items.name: finder-window
items.title: Finder Launch Deck Window
items.description: High against synthetic Launch Deck reference capture. File/folder handoff scenes that need Finder without a full desktop shell. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.

items.name: mac-dock
items.title: macOS Dock
items.description: Macos-web-informed editable Dock with real app icons, magnification-free layout, and indicator dots. Desktop scenes that need the Dock as a launch point for app-open beats (used by examples/mac-multi-app-demo.html).

items.name: mac-menu-bar
items.title: macOS Menu Bar
items.description: Macos-web-informed editable menu-bar primitive with self-contained Apple glyph and status icons. Wrapper compositions that need Mac desktop context without duplicating menu bar HTML/CSS or importing a full desktop lab. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.

items.name: mac-wallpaper
items.title: macOS Wallpaper Catalog
items.description: 75-wallpaper desktop-background catalog: the full macOS lineage (Cheetah→Tahoe) plus Mac/iMac colour masters as real bundled images, and an original CSS set of gradients, metallics, solid colours, and patterns. The desktop background layer behind mac-menu-bar, mac-dock, and app windows. Pick any of 75 wallpapers via data-wallpaper (e.g. sonoma, catalina-day, big-sur-color-day, solid-space-gray, mesh-aurora).

items.name: premiere-editor
items.title: Premiere-style Video Editor
items.description: Code-native video editor shell. Video editing, timeline manipulation, captions, clip trimming, and review workflow scenes.

items.name: presentation-editor
items.title: PowerPoint-like Presentation Editor
items.description: Medium-high, pending source-captured PowerPoint geometry. Deck-editing demos and main Claude-to-PowerPoint workflow scenes.

items.name: word-editor
items.title: Word-style Document Editor
items.description: Word for web targeted editable document shell grounded in Microsoft Support screenshot references. Document editing, review, comments, tracked-change, and memo workflow scenes.

items.name: backlot-cursors
items.title: macOS Cursor Set
items.description: Recreated macOS pointer SVGs (normal, link, text, move) used by the demo cursor element.

items.name: backlot-foundation
items.title: Backlot Foundation Styles
items.description: Shared foundation stylesheet and brand fonts used by every UI Backlot surface. Installs to styles/ and assets/fonts/.

items.name: backlot-runtime
items.title: Backlot Runtime
items.description: backlot-component-loader.js (mounts surfaces via data-backlot-mount-src), backlot-interactions.js (scriptable cursor/typing/streaming actions on the HyperFrames timeline), and backlot-liquid-glass.js (Apple-style optical refraction on any [data-liquid-glass] element).

items.name: browser-interaction
items.title: Browser Interaction
items.description: Browser demo: type a URL, a loading bar sweeps, the page loads. Fully self-contained: npx degit conmeara/ui-backlot/registry/examples/browser-interaction my-video && cd my-video && npx hyperframes render --composition index.html --quality draft

items.name: claude-chat-interaction
items.title: Claude Chat Interaction
items.description: Claude chat demo: type a prompt, send, thinking, streamed reply. Fully self-contained: npx degit conmeara/ui-backlot/registry/examples/claude-chat-interaction my-video && cd my-video && npx hyperframes render --composition index.html --quality draft

items.name: claude-code-interaction
items.title: Claude Code Interaction
items.description: Claude Code CLI demo: type a command — tool calls and a summary stream in. Fully self-contained: npx degit conmeara/ui-backlot/registry/examples/claude-code-interaction my-video && cd my-video && npx hyperframes render --composition index.html --quality draft

items.name: codex-interaction
items.title: Codex Interaction
items.description: Codex CLI demo: type a command, stream the terminal output. Fully self-contained: npx degit conmeara/ui-backlot/registry/examples/codex-interaction my-video && cd my-video && npx hyperframes render --composition index.html --quality draft

items.name: cowork-interaction
items.title: Cowork Interaction
items.description: Claude cowork demo: prompt, tool card with progress steps, streamed reply. Fully self-contained: npx degit conmeara/ui-backlot/registry/examples/cowork-interaction my-video && cd my-video && npx hyperframes render --composition index.html --quality draft

items.name: excel-interaction
items.title: Excel Interaction
items.description: Excel demo: select a range, type =SUM(C5:C7), the result reveals. Fully self-contained: npx degit conmeara/ui-backlot/registry/examples/excel-interaction my-video && cd my-video && npx hyperframes render --composition index.html --quality draft

items.name: finder-interaction
items.title: Finder Interaction
items.description: Finder demo: the column-view Finder component with scripted file selection. Fully self-contained: npx degit conmeara/ui-backlot/registry/examples/finder-interaction my-video && cd my-video && npx hyperframes render --composition index.html --quality draft

items.name: mac-multi-app
items.title: Mac Multi App
items.description: macOS desktop scene: the cursor opens the Claude app from the Dock, then Excel on top — menu bar, dock, and two app surfaces composed. Fully self-contained: npx degit conmeara/ui-backlot/registry/examples/mac-multi-app my-video && cd my-video && npx hyperframes render --composition index.html --quality draft

items.name: powerpoint-interaction
items.title: Powerpoint Interaction
items.description: PowerPoint demo: click the title box, type the slide title, save. Fully self-contained: npx degit conmeara/ui-backlot/registry/examples/powerpoint-interaction my-video && cd my-video && npx hyperframes render --composition index.html --quality draft

items.name: quickstart
items.title: Quickstart
items.description: The 14-second starter scene: macOS menu bar, browser surface, and Claude chat pane composed into one renderable demo. Fully self-contained: npx degit conmeara/ui-backlot/registry/examples/quickstart my-video && cd my-video && npx hyperframes render --composition index.html --quality draft

items.name: word-interaction
items.title: Word Interaction
items.description: Word demo: the title types, body paragraphs stream, word count ticks up. Fully self-contained: npx degit conmeara/ui-backlot/registry/examples/word-interaction my-video && cd my-video && npx hyperframes render --composition index.html --quality draft
